description: A public storefront photo request with a known city, tomorrow timing, and photo proof should be ready to open without forcing private access requirements.

requestInput.rawAsk: need to onsite visit and take picture of any uniqlo storefront around manila tomorrow

brief.title: Visit a Uniqlo storefront around Manila and take photos
brief.body: Need someone to onsite visit and take picture of any Uniqlo storefront around Manila tomorrow.
